zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Thorpe於1319年8月29日出生在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普時，他的父親Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe30歲，母親Beatrice HENGRAVE32歲。他和Joan Baynard至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1393年5月12日在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Thorpe于1319年8月29日出生在英国諾福爾可阿申維爾索普时，他的父亲Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe30岁，母亲Beatrice HENGRAVE32岁。他和Joan Baynard至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1393年5月12日在他的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Thorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): from Middle English thorp(e) ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English thorp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from any of several places called Thorp(e), which are most frequent in Yorkshire, the Midlands, and East Anglia. Compare Throop .

variants.name: Trupp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Hermann, Reinhold.

English (Herefordshire and Monmouthshire): variant of   Thorpe  , or from a place so named, such as Thrupp (Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire), Thrupe (Somerset), Throop (Dorset, Hampshire, Somerset), and Throope (Wiltshire).

variants.name: Throop
meanings: English: from Middle English throp ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English throp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from Throop in Hampshire, Throope in Wiltshire, Thrup in Oxfordshire, or any of the places called Thrupp in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, and Northamptonshire. Compare Thorpe .

variants.name: Tharpe
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Thorpe  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thorp
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Thorpe  .

variants.name: Troup
meanings: Scottish (eastern): habitational name from a place in the parish of Gamrie, near Banff. The placename is unexplained, perhaps a Pictish cognate of Welsh trwp ‘vessel, dish, basin’.
Possibly also English, a metathesized form of   Thorpe  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Thorpe was born on 29 August 1319, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe, was 30 and his mother, Beatrice HENGRAVE, was 32. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Joan Baynard. He died on 12 May 1393, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Thorpe est né le 29 août 1319, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatrice HENGRAVE, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Joan Baynard. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1393, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Thorpe am 29. August 1319 in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe 30 und seine Mutter Beatrice HENGRAVE 32. Er hatte mit Joan Baynard mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Mai 1393 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Thorpe è nato il il 29 agosto 1319 nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice HENGRAVE, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Joan Baynard. Morì il 12 maggio 1393, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Thorpeが1319年8月29日にイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpeは30歳，母Beatrice HENGRAVEは32歳であった。彼はJoan Baynardとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1393年5月12日に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Thorpe(이)가 1319년 8월 29일 영국 노르폴크 애스h웰소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice HENGRAVE(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Joan Baynard(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년 5월 12일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.29 August 1319–12 May 1393: 29 de agosto de 1319–12 de maio de 1393
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Thorpe nasceu em 29 de agosto de 1319, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice HENGRAVE, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Joan Baynard. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1393, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Thorpe родился 29 августа 1319 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice HENGRAVE, 32. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Joan Baynard. Он умер 12 мая 1393 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.29 August 1319–12 May 1393: 29 de agosto de 1319–12 de mayo de 1393
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Thorpe nació el 29 de agosto de 1319, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert De Thorpe Lord Thorpe of Ashwell Thorpe, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Beatrice HENGRAVE, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Joan Baynard. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1393, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
